mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SENTENCE_SET ( MEMBER_ID, FOLDER_ID, SET_NAME, DESCRIPTION, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{folderId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{setName}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.SET_ID, s.FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME AS folderName, s.SET_NAME, s.DESCRIPTION, s.DISPLAY_ORDER, s.IS_ACTIVE, s.CREATED_AT, s.UPDATED_AT FROM TB_SENTENCE_SET s LEFT JOIN TB_FOLDER f ON f.FOLDER_ID = s.FOLDER_ID AND f.MEMBER_ID = s.MEMBER_ID AND f.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' WHERE s.SET_ID = #{setId} AND s.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND s.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_SENTENCE_SET
SET_NAME = #{setName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FOLDER_ID = NULL,
FOLDER_ID = #{folderId, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE SET_ID = #{setId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_SENTENCE_SET SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE SET_ID = #{setId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
